title: Starting now.
excerpt: Three months of telling the story quietly, in pieces, to whoever asked, is enough of that.

title: Horror-Fi: Ottawa's First Horror & Sci-Fi Con
excerpt: Ottawa's first horror-and-sci-fi-only show, and why a smaller, all-vendor floor beat the usual general pop culture sprawl.

title: How I Learned to Stop Googling and Start Talking to AI
excerpt: I went from AI strategist to AI builder over three months of hobby time. A job search pipeline, a collections website, and an accidental operating system — what I actually built, and what I didn't see coming.

title: What Introversion Actually Costs
excerpt: I would rather stand in front of 200 people and give a presentation than walk into a cocktail hour with 50. Most people find that hard to believe.

title: 50 Boxes for 50 Years
excerpt: Fifty boxes. Fifty years. The math was deliberate. The results were honest.

title: Unapologetically Canadian
excerpt: I've lived in four provinces, spent real time in a couple of other countries, and done enough travelling to have a frame of reference. So when I say I wouldn't want to live anywhere else, it's not a default.

title: Collecting Canadian
excerpt: The maple leaf shows up in the collection more than I planned for it to. Turns out if you put a maple leaf on something, I'll probably end up owning it.
